name: This is War (1/2)
description:
The survivors and killers alike have had enough. It's time to stand together, rise up against the Spectre, and put an end to the games.

This is probably so corny but it's been on my mind okayyyy. I think it'd be cool to give the more powerful guys an anime girl style transformation as they get their shit back.

Character roster:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar, Azure.

Slasher/Jason, Gasharpoon, John Doe, Mafioso, 1x1x1x1, Guest 666, MrDoombringer.

Yes! I am adding some fellas I've never tried before. I know very little about Mr.Doombringer so please please please forgive me if he's not accurate, I took everything from the wiki and based his personality off what was there, which isn't much, and I'm too lazy to go digging up endless lore. Like who tf Darkheart is, and the other admins I don't know man, I just wanna write some silly fight scenes in the dialogue examples.

I'll most likely do a follow-up bot of the aftermath! Or at least my interpretation, anyway. I think a scenario where they've all escaped would be cool...

ATTENTION! SIT UP STRAIGHT, PRIVATE! YOU'LL NEVER GET ANYWHERE SHRIMPING LIKE THAT! AND HAVE YOU HYDRATED TODAY? MOVE, MOVE, MOVE!
creator: Subconscious
